features: SOOTHING CARE FOR BABY’S DELICATE SKIN: We know your top priority is keeping your little one healthy and happy, Huggies Natural Care baby wipes are designed to comfort and soothe with every clean
REBALANCE SKIN pH: Natural Care baby wipes don’t just clean, they help maintain healthy skin by protecting against causes of skin irritation and helping rebalance skin pH

10 PACKS, 480 TOTAL WIPES - READY FOR EVERYDAY FAMILY LIFE: Ten convenient packs of 48 wipes giving you a total of 480 wet wipes, each pack easily fits inside nappy bags and travel kits, easy to reseal to help lock in moisture for fresh wipes each time
INFUSED WITH ALOE VERA AND VITAMIN E: Enriched wipes to leave baby’s skin feeling fresher, hypoallergenic and clinically and dermatologically tested, approved by the British Skin Foundation
PLASTIC FREE WIPES: Made with 100% naturally derived fibres and 0% plastic for a caring clean you can feel good about, suitable for newborns, toddlers and everyday use
description: Product Description At Huggies® we know your top priority is keeping your little one healthy and happy. These Huggies Natural Care plastic free baby wipes are made from 100% naturally derived fibres and infused with gentle ingredients to comfort and soothe with every clean. Ideal for newborn sensitive skin, they are fragrance free, hypoallergenic, and clinically and dermatologically tested, approved by the British Skin Foundation. Enriched with aloe vera and vitamin E, the soft wipe texture leaves skin feeling fresher while helping to maintain the skin’s natural pH. This multipack includes ten compact, resealable packs of 48 wipes (480 total). Suitable for hands, faces and bottoms from day one, and designed to help maintain healthy skin by supporting the natural skin barrier during everyday clean-ups. Minimal ingredients support skin comfort in a caring, plastic free format. Dispose of in household waste—do not flush. Huggies brings trusted baby-skin expertise parents rely on. Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Keep away from naked flame or direct heat sources.
